# Copilot Instructions

Use [../AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the canonical repository guide. Also read the
nearest scoped `AGENTS.md` before editing inside `packages/meshsa`, `ops`, or
`hardware`.

Keep responses and patches focused. Prefer existing registry, Protocol, test, and
config patterns over new abstractions. When adding repeatable workflow knowledge,
create or update a skill under [../.agents/skills](../.agents/skills) instead of
expanding this file.
